title: Rahatgarh Heat Wave
lead: Rahatgarh is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.14. The city has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Rahatgarh has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 20.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 23%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is 3.4 km/h. 
 The city's energy consumption is expected to increase due to the high demand for cooling.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
